lyrics.content:
[ti:Bride Awakening]
[ar:Melody Inspire]
[al:Hearts in Bloom]
[length:04:07]

[00:00.00]
[00:08.40](soft piano, single sustained note)
[00:16.80]As the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride
[00:24.20]So my God rejoiceth over me
[00:32.50]I was sleeping in the long night
[00:40.10]Now the morning calls my name
[00:48.90]
[00:52.30]Wake up, wake up, O sleeper rise
[01:00.70]The Lamb has set the table wide
[01:08.90]Trim the lamp and keep it burning
[01:17.10]The Beloved is returning
[01:25.40]
[01:33.80]Hearts in bloom, hearts in bloom
[01:42.10]Every petal, every wound
[01:50.50]Turning toward the morning sun
[01:58.90]The marriage supper has begun
[02:07.20]
[02:15.60](strings enter, hushed)
[02:24.00]I have washed my robe in mercy
[02:32.40]I have laid my crown of dust
[02:40.70]Every promise He has spoken
[02:49.10]Has been faithful, has been just
[02:57.50]
[03:05.80]Wake up, wake up, the day is dawning
[03:14.20]Wake up, wake up, the Bridegroom's calling
[03:22.60]Hearts in bloom, hearts in bloom
[03:31.00]The wedding chamber, the upper room
[03:39.40]
[03:47.80](full ensemble, building)
[03:56.20]Even so come, Lord Jesus, come
[04:04.50]Even so come
[04:07.00]
lyrics.plain_text: As the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so my God rejoiceth over me. I was sleeping in the long night; now the morning calls my name. Wake up, wake up, O sleeper rise — the Lamb has set the table wide. Trim the lamp and keep it burning, the Beloved is returning. Hearts in bloom, hearts in bloom — every petal, every wound turning toward the morning sun. The marriage supper has begun. I have washed my robe in mercy, I have laid my crown of dust. Every promise He has spoken has been faithful, has been just. Wake up, wake up, the day is dawning; wake up, wake up, the Bridegroom's calling. Hearts in bloom, hearts in bloom — the wedding chamber, the upper room. Even so come, Lord Jesus, come. Even so come.

translations.ro: Cum se bucură mirele de mireasă, așa se bucură Dumnezeul meu de mine...
